outcome_blind_frozen_specification.research_question: Does unlevered monthly SPY exposure scaled down when trailing realized volatility is high improve risk-adjusted performance relative to fully invested SPY?
outcome_blind_frozen_specification.null_hypothesis: The strategy does not have a higher monthly Sharpe ratio than the matched SPY buy-and-hold benchmark.
outcome_blind_frozen_specification.instrument_selection: fixed before outcome access; not a dynamic stock pool
outcome_blind_frozen_specification.decision_time: 20:05:00 America/New_York on the final accepted XNYS session of each calendar month

signal.annualized_volatility: sample standard deviation of the 21 log total returns with ddof=1 multiplied by sqrt(252)

portfolio.causal_decision_time_sizing_price: latest accepted raw close available no later than decision_at
portfolio.execution_open_price_role: fill observation only; it can never alter requested shares

corporate_actions.cash_distribution_entitlement: ex-date for shares held before the open
corporate_actions.semantic_correction: information availability at ex-date open and cash arrival at pay-date are distinct; the prior uncommitted record conflated them

splits.holdout_access_rule: open exactly once only after every validation gate passes

validation_gates: strategy monthly Sharpe minus SPY monthly Sharpe is greater than zero
strategy compounded net return is greater than zero
strategy annualized volatility is lower than SPY annualized volatility
strategy maximum drawdown is greater than SPY maximum drawdown under the frozen negative-sign convention

holdout_primary_inference.statistic: strategy monthly Sharpe minus SPY monthly Sharpe
holdout_primary_inference.pass_rule: one-sided 95 percent lower bound is greater than zero

holdout_secondary_gates: strategy compounded net return is greater than zero
strategy annualized volatility is lower than SPY annualized volatility
strategy maximum drawdown is greater than SPY maximum drawdown under the frozen negative-sign convention

terminal_rules.validation_and_holdout_pass: pending external review; strategy_candidate_available remains false

forbidden_changes: add smoothing, a volatility floor, a hysteresis band, or a minimum weight
reuse or repair US31, US36, US41, US46, the 200-day trend, three-ETF inverse-volatility, or dual-momentum lineages

tiingo_raw_eod.signal_availability: raw close is usable only after the corresponding accepted XNYS close and no later than the 20:05 decision

tiingo_amount_comparison.resolution: official State Street value controls every event; Tiingo is comparison-only and no automatic fusion is allowed

corporate_action_and_lifecycle.lifecycle_rule: the fixed SPY identity is supported by the prospectus, official events, and continuous accepted sessions; any missing open or identity cohort fails closed
corporate_action_and_lifecycle.split_conflict_rule: Tiingo and official evidence report no split; any later conflict fails closed

regulatory_semantic_basis.role: supports definitive dividend information and dates reaching market organizations before ex-date
supports advance notice of distributions before the record date

input_qualification_evidence.shared_p0_pending: shared P0 PR must be externally accepted and merged before outcome access; the code-only adapter and synthetic tests are already independently validated

adjudication.next_action: after the shared P0 PR is externally accepted and merged, execute validation exactly once; open holdout only if every frozen validation gate passes
